arts.ttl: Managing Madrid Podcast: Real Madrid 4 - 1 Espanyol, La Liga 2024 - 2025
arts.sum: On this episode of the Managing Madrid Podcast, Kiyan Sobhani breaks down Real Madrid ’s 4 - 1 win over Espanyol at the Bernabeu on Saturday night. It also serves as a means for Real Madrid fans to connect and discuss the team.

arts.ttl: Kylian Mbappé set a new career-best benchmark in Real Madrid’s win over Espanyol
arts.sum: A head-turning statistic surrounding the creative exploits of Real Madrid star Kylian Mbappé during the club’s latest outing has on Saturday night come to the fore. Real, of course, marked…

arts.ttl: Ancelotti: “Endrick has a lot of quality, but in front of him are Vinicius, Rodrygo, and Mbappé”
arts.sum: “He is a fantastic defensive pivot, someone who adapts very well to the centre-back position. He was able to play the whole match without any problems.

arts.ttl: Luka Modrić hails 4 ‘world-class superstar’ teammates after Real Madrid 4-1 Espanyol
arts.sum: Real Madrid star Luka Modrić has on Saturday night moved to reveal his appreciation for a quartet of teammates in Spain’s capital. This, of course, comes fresh off Real’s latest…

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti provides Bellingham & Carvajal injury updates after Espanyol
arts.sum: Real Madrid head coach Carlo Ancelotti has tonight provided updates on the wellbeing of two members of his squad. This comes after both set alarm bells ringing in the club’s…

arts.sum: Tributes continued to pour in this weekend from around the football world for Italia ’90...

arts.ttl: Real Madrid 4-1 Espanyol: Highlights, man of the match, stats
arts.sum: Vinicius Junior and Kylian Mbappe grab a goal apiece to help Real Madrid fight back from a goal down to beat Espanyol 4-1 at the Santiago Bernabeu.

arts.ttl: Super sub Vinícius sets up one and scores another as Real Madrid beats Espanyol
arts.sum: Espanyol goalkeeper Joan García made several saves including of shots by Kylian Mbappé before the Olympic gold medalist started an attack with a long pass from his box that ended with an own goal by counterpart Thibaut Courtois in the 54th minute. Vinícius beat García in the 78th for his goal after Espanyol lost the ball and Mbappé played his attack partner clear on the break.

arts.ttl: Immediate Reaction: Real Madrid 4 - 1 Espanyol, La Liga 2024 - 2025
arts.sum: Real Madrid 4 - 1 Espanyol (Courtois OG; Carvajal, Rodrygo, Vinicius, Mbappe). Real Madrid secured a commanding 4-1 victory over Espanyol tonight at the Santiago Bernabeu, thanks to a second-half flurry of goals after some early frustration in front of goal.

arts.ttl: Vinícius > Mbappé: Real Madrid’s true star proves himself once more vs Espanyol
arts.sum: Real Madrid’s victory over Espanyol on Saturday evening saw the club’s true ‘star man’ come to the fore when his teammates needed him most. Los Blancos are of course fresh…
